headline: Is Emerson Electric (EMR) Quietly Reframing Its Automation Story Around Physical AI At The Edge?
summary: Earlier this week, Emerson Electric announced collaborations with SiMa.ai to embed advanced AI in its rugged industrial PCs and with Aramco to co-develop real-time corrosion management solutions using ultrasonic monitoring and analytics. Together, these moves extend Emerson’s role across the full industrial automation stack, pairing edge AI hardware with domain-specific monitoring to support on-site, data-driven operational decisions. We’ll now examine how Emerson’s push into Physical AI at...
